textByHash.063af645764379007ce6446db671d0fa14c708ac: I should imagine it would suit your limited means.
textByHash.16286156b9bb19806b0f58811dd0ae2f3b9d68ac: What possible reason would you have for cluttering up my river with your inferior water craft!
textByHash.1e7900006df4667e63564154e61c16981ef7544d: My personal favourite is the Stable Dugout canoe. A finer craft you'll never see old bean!
textByHash.3afaa4f5c8fff0f5ce4bd70f32908a046af36047: It's really quite simple. Just walk down to that tree on the bank and chop it down.
textByHash.3e88a7a2b6b6b81ba4aa35afb67754a616c62a7a: Well ... erm. You seem to be able to make a Waka!
textByHash.43e1d5c66b48b9d90c590ded6b6d9ac603176ab0: I'm canoeing on the river! It's enormous fun! Would you like to know how?
textByHash.51d57689bf7321394cea59b7ff1f1aa48d44c088: I'd be surprised if you haven't already heard of me?
textByHash.52a98b0de3cb87eedf13cb40e8841a3713c681ce: Still, I'm sure it will satisfy one such as yourself.
textByHash.5b587866be6f1def68ad657179b822d67dca4a76: If you were of good pedigree I'd let you join my boat club. You seem to be one of those vagabond adventurers though.
textByHash.601b8efddec9fad97d23596ebe24df33e3527393: Unfortunately, you don't have the skill to create anything more than one of those logs. I dare say it will only get 1 stop down the river!
textByHash.609b3e6c2fc63bf73112e705f29d0feaea49fce6: Well, you don't look like you have the skill to make a canoe.
textByHash.656a11a5ade63334e40cc20582554160cfe70723: Well, you're just an itinerant adventurer!
textByHash.969303373fdad3d6ea7f5beca05bad0ab4d6bf2e: Ah! Perfect! You can make a Stable Dugout canoe! One of those will carry you to any civilised place on the river.
textByHash.9fa26fa6d6b55d7c1a7fe0f963544101a551898f: When you have done that you can shape the log further with your axe to make a canoe.
textByHash.a4731608d17324aa65589a57c9780167f5803a4a: People say he was born in the Wilderness and that he is looking for a route back.
textByHash.a4e828d0709012120922371ab7c8b486e2d068f7: You should know of me because I am a member of the royal family of Misthalin!
textByHash.a5784c709f80d9b6f7f17e1fe533145080bce838: How should I know? I would not consort with such a base fellow!
textByHash.aafe6a9a0d5675050d5ff4a8694f8b054f0b572d: Do not profane the royal house of Varrock by engaging me in further discourse you knave!
textByHash.ae39f9e6d525366fc1d49efd97446f684ba11b9a: Further up river, near the Barbarian Village, I saw some darned fool 'canoeing' on a log!
textByHash.c64fb45a151ad4d0153050dccc82306b51118ef4: I'm sure you can build a Dugout canoe. Not as fine as a Stable Dugout but it will carry you 2 stops on the river.
textByHash.cae6539660f261fcb4040bc5e28e8384ee09cbbf: I've only ever seen one man on the river who uses a Waka. A big, fearsome looking fellow up near Edgeville.
textByHash.d2ca7511c5dac80e8793f63aaab5a1f0c53caf39: You seem to be quite handy with an axe though!
textByHash.dc4f9183561f7367fa410d96983c11cd5128263d: A Stable Dugout canoe will take you pretty much the length of the Lum river.
textByHash.e36c28565ce81402eceadbd78751116d01909a51: I'm his 4th cousin, once removed on his mothers side.
textByHash.e9b4e1da7653632b543c5e0539037feea6a9ec08: You need to have at least level 12 woodcutting.
textByHash.ee88a4eaa3ebdef2ba27cddf175babb5037fd8c1: Of course there are other canoes.
textByHash.f446cc1d49593fc57624e4f73e640237c5b1b255: Once you are able to make a canoe it makes travel along the river much quicker!
textByHash.f8870adc1d71fd5953dd27abc8f3d7faca76c343: Hello old bean. Is there something I can help you with?
